firstTimePopupHeading1Label.message: Only send messages to people who really want to hear about you.

firstTimePopupHeading1Message.message: If many people are not interested in what you are offering, they will flag you as spam to Whatsapp, so they will ban you.

firstTimePopupHeading2Label.message: Send maximum 500 messages per day per phone number.

firstTimePopupHeading2Message.message: If you need to send more than 500 messages, then you should acquire multiple codes and use it with multiple phone numbers. If your number is new, then you need to start with just 50 messages, and move slowly to 500 after a few weeks.

firstTimePopupHeading3Message.message: In this way Whatsapp's algorithm doesn't flag you and bans you. Learn how to use them in this video.

firstTimePopupSubHeading.message: Before you start pay attention to these steps to avoid having your number banned:
